subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of him who hath soared unto the Divine Lote-Tree and attained that which was inscribed therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلمی الاعلی ان اذکر من طار الی سدره المنتهی و فاز بما کان مسطورا فی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
